Translation.Description: The tool of choice for taking Constructs apart and discovering what makes them tick. Apply some reverse engineering here, hammer away like a primal savage there, and build up a solid theory for your "Thinking Machines" thesis.
Translation.Provides: Bash- Has a chance equal to the damage done of knocking the victim prone
Crushing Blow - Attack at +1 per Stamina
Crippling Blow- +100% Attack, but you lose your next action
